symptom_description: High leakage current (`0.46 Mega-ohms` insulation resistance) to earth. Stator winding temperature RTD spiked abruptly to `89`°C before trip.
root_cause: Overloading motor beyond `1.15` service factor (`drawing 29%` above rated `82 Amps`) during peak production caused sustained copper heating (`158`°C).
action_taken: Performed complete motor replacement (`Spec-673`), renewed lead lugs (`158 ft-lbs` torque), and verified dynamic balance (`0.41` in/sec) and laser alignment (`0.018 gap`).
parts_used: Warehouse Spare Induction Motor Assembly, Mounting Bolt Set, Lead Connectors

symptom_description: High horizontal vibration measured at motor drive-end (`0.28` in/sec RMS, `34%` above ISO 10816 alarm threshold). Unit humming loudly (`chattering`). Also inspected PUMP-102 to rule out secondary mechanical strain or electrical feed anomalies.
root_cause: Uneven accumulation of heavy dried process cake and dirt (`0.28 inch` layer) inside rotor cooling channels and external fan blades.
action_taken: Removed rotor from stator, cleaned debris from cooling slots, checked shaft runout on lathe (`0.012 inch`), and dynamically balanced rotor to G2.5 grade (`0.71` in/sec).
parts_used: Replacement Cooling Fan Assembly, Shaft Key, Balancing Weights

symptom_description: High horizontal vibration measured at motor drive-end (`0.69` in/sec RMS, `37%` above ISO 10816 alarm threshold). Unit humming loudly (`thumping`).
root_cause: Loss of balancing weight (`7.6 lbs` mass detached) from cooling fan or rotor end ring due to vibration fatigue (`0.82` in/sec) over `12260` hours.
action_taken: Disassembled cooling fan shroud, cleaned rotor assembly (`6.9 lbs` dirt cleared), and performed in-situ two-plane dynamic field balancing using trim weights (`P/N 9775-REV2`).
parts_used: Dynamic Balancing Trim Weight Kit, Fan Shroud Fasteners

symptom_description: Vibration analysis indicates severe inner race defect frequencies (BPFI) on motor drive-end bearing (`0.75` in/sec RMS) with `extreme` harmonics. Maintenance triggered after unusual process flow/pressure drop noted on primary process unit PUMP-102.
root_cause: Normal fatigue wear of deep groove ball bearings (`0.015 inch` race play) after exceeding `25094` hours of continuous operating life.
action_taken: Disassembled motor, installed insulated NDE bearing and standard DE bearing (`Spec-374`), verified proper clearance (`0.012 gap`), and tested smooth running (`0.62` in/sec).
parts_used: SKF Deep Groove Ball Bearing Set, Grease Valve Kit, End Shield Gasket

symptom_description: Main breaker tripped instantly (`80 Amps` fault) upon energization at `460V +/- 4%`. Stator surge comparison test confirmed turn-to-turn short in phase coil.
root_cause: Overloading motor beyond `1.15` service factor (`drawing 17%` above rated `184 Amps`) during peak production caused sustained copper heating (`116`°C).
action_taken: Performed complete motor replacement (`P/N 5182-X`), renewed lead lugs (`144 ft-lbs` torque), and verified dynamic balance (`0.74` in/sec) and laser alignment (`0.011 gap`).
parts_used: Warehouse Spare Induction Motor Assembly, Mounting Bolt Set, Lead Connectors

symptom_description: High horizontal vibration measured at motor drive-end (`0.30` in/sec RMS, `12%` above ISO 10816 alarm threshold). Unit humming loudly (`high-pitched squealing`).
root_cause: Uneven accumulation of heavy dried process cake and dirt (`0.12 inch` layer) inside rotor cooling channels and external fan blades.
action_taken: Removed rotor from stator, cleaned debris from cooling slots, checked shaft runout on lathe (`0.012 inch`), and dynamically balanced rotor to G2.5 grade (`0.39` in/sec).
parts_used: Replacement Cooling Fan Assembly, Shaft Key, Balancing Weights

symptom_description: Vibration analysis indicates severe inner race defect frequencies (BPFI) on motor drive-end bearing (`0.24` in/sec RMS) with `progressive` harmonics.
root_cause: Contamination of bearing grease with ambient chemical dust (`180 ppm` solids) through defective shaft labyrinth seal (`0.018 gap`).
action_taken: Replaced DE/NDE bearings (`P/N 5805-REV2`), installed upgraded non-contact INPRO labyrinth shaft seals (`P/N 6841-REV2`), and greased with Polyrex EM (`64%` fill).
parts_used: Precision Ball Bearing C3 Set, INPRO Labyrinth Seal Kit, Polyrex EM Grease

symptom_description: High leakage current (`0.51 Mega-ohms` insulation resistance) to earth. Stator winding temperature RTD spiked abruptly to `125`°C before trip.
root_cause: Contamination of stator coils with airborne conductive dust (`40 ppm`) and moisture (`RH > 40%`) due to missing terminal box gasket.
action_taken: Replaced motor with premium efficiency spare (`P/N 4006-B`), installed line reactor (`Spec-190`) on VFD output (`460V`), and renewed terminal box seals.
parts_used: Stator Rewind Kit, VFD Output Line Reactor, Terminal Gasket Set

symptom_description: Main breaker tripped instantly (`30 Amps` fault) upon energization at `460V +/- 4%`. Stator surge comparison test confirmed turn-to-turn short in phase coil.
root_cause: Voltage spikes (`> 460V +/- 2% peak`) from VFD switching transients exceeded insulation dielectric breakdown threshold (`0.17 Mega-ohms` remaining resistance).
action_taken: Swapped out failed motor with certified warehouse spare unit (`Spec-955`); sent damaged stator for rewind and core loss testing (`1.5%`).
parts_used: Complete Replacement Induction Motor 50HP, Coupling Key, Shim Pack

symptom_description: Main breaker tripped instantly (`185 Amps` fault) upon energization at `480V +/- 1%`. Stator surge comparison test confirmed turn-to-turn short in phase coil.
root_cause: Contamination of stator coils with airborne conductive dust (`115 ppm`) and moisture (`RH > 63%`) due to missing terminal box gasket.
action_taken: Replaced motor with premium efficiency spare (`P/N 4745-B`), installed line reactor (`Spec-158`) on VFD output (`460V +/- 2%`), and renewed terminal box seals.
parts_used: Stator Rewind Kit, VFD Output Line Reactor, Terminal Gasket Set

symptom_description: Ops reported strong heat waves radiating from motor frame (`135`°C) and `62%` drop in operating speed (`RPM`). Field diagnostics indicate misalignment at shaft coupling connecting directly to PUMP-102.
root_cause: Voltage unbalance of `13%` across supply lines (`480V`) caused `27%` increase in localized rotor and stator copper heating (`122`°C).
action_taken: Installed auxiliary cooling blower unit (`P/N 6970-REV2`) for low-speed VFD operation (`< 53 Hz`) and cleaned existing motor frame cooling channels (`49%` airflow restored).
parts_used: Auxiliary Forced-Air Blower Kit 460V, Fan Shroud Mounting Brackets

symptom_description: Motor frame temperature exceeding `124`°C measured across cooling fins. RTD sensors indicating winding temp near `98`°C (`alarm limit 140°C`). Issue first noticed after high-temperature trip occurred on PUMP-102.
root_cause: Broken external cooling fan blade (`23%` fan area lost) caused loss of turbulent airflow across cooling ribs under `75 Amps` load.
action_taken: Replaced damaged polypropylene cooling fan (`P/N 1761-B`), straightened bent fan cowl (`0.008 gap`), and verified full airflow restoration (`76`°C housing).
parts_used: Polypropylene Replacement Cooling Fan, Cowl Hardware Kit

symptom_description: Continuous thermal cycling alarms (`94`°C trip setpoint). Cooling airflow exiting fan cover feels severely restricted (`35%` drop).
root_cause: Running motor at low RPM (`< 23 Hz`) via VFD without auxiliary blower forced-air cooling, leading to severe thermal stagnation (`120`°C).
action_taken: Corrected upstream tap settings on transformer to balance phase voltage (`230V`), deep cleaned motor heat sink fins, and verified winding temp dropped (`-96`°C).
parts_used: Cooling Fan Blade Assembly, Shroud Fasteners, Fan Guard Grid

symptom_description: High leakage current (`0.31 Mega-ohms` insulation resistance) to earth. Stator winding temperature RTD spiked abruptly to `117`°C before trip.
root_cause: Localized stator core lamination short (`94`°C hotspot) burnt through adjacent winding slot liner during `23275` hours of high-load running.
action_taken: Disassembled motor, performed lamination core restacking and acid burn, completed Class H rewind (`P/N 5760-REV2`), and tested under full load (`71 Amps` at `480V +/- 2%`).
parts_used: Stator Lamination Restack Kit, Rewind Coil Set Class H, Lead Wire Assembly

symptom_description: Motor frame temperature exceeding `104`°C measured across cooling fins. RTD sensors indicating winding temp near `102`°C (`alarm limit 140°C`). Suspect binding or restriction here caused elevated current draw on PUMP-102.
root_cause: Broken external cooling fan blade (`25%` fan area lost) caused loss of turbulent airflow across cooling ribs under `160 Amps` load.
action_taken: Replaced damaged polypropylene cooling fan (`Spec-200`), straightened bent fan cowl (`0.009 gap`), and verified full airflow restoration (`96`°C housing).
parts_used: Polypropylene Replacement Cooling Fan, Cowl Hardware Kit
